FIRST LOGIN GUIDE
What changed in Dashboard + Objectives

Dashboard is now the command view for deciding what needs attention. Objectives is the working record for OKRs, KRs, projects, gates, files, audit, and signoffs.

Start in Dashboard

Use the lenses to see active work, stale KRs, blockers, departments, and due-date pressure without changing the source records.

Work in Objectives

Open the objective to manage structure, metrics, linked projects, gate blockers, evidence files, audit history, and signoffs.

Review the tree

Company OKRs, department OKRs, key results, and linked projects now live in one hierarchy so work does not drift away from the result it supports.

Use the exports

Jake one-pagers, department scorecards, R&D pipeline reports, quarterly scorecards, and project audit packs are built from the same live objective data.
